heading: Definition
label: 3528 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, the term “State” means each of the several States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, and any territory or possession of the United States.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1984section 1210 of Pub. L. 98–473section 3521 of this title
